Large Projects Completed

Discover All the Services we Provide

Clear, reliable electrical solutions for commercial and residential projects—delivered safely, efficiently, and to code.

Testing & Diagnostics

Specialized electrical testing including megger testing, voltage monitoring, and system evaluations to support troubleshooting, compliance, and engineering review.

Commercial Electrical

Tenant improvements, power distribution, lighting upgrades, switchgear, and ongoing maintenance for offices, retail, medical, and multi-unit properties.

Residential Electrical

Service upgrades, lighting, panel work, repairs, and electrical improvements designed for safety, comfort, and long-term reliability in your home.

40+ Years Industry Experience

Electrical Controls & Automation

Scott Skiles brings 14 years of hands-on expertise in industrial and commercial control systems. From complex automation to high-value residential projects, we deliver precision-engineered solutions.

PLC Programming

Programmable Logic Controllers for industrial process control and automation.

VFDs

Variable Frequency Drives for motor speed control and energy efficiency.

SCADA Systems

Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition for real-time system monitoring.

Megger Testing

Insulation resistance testing for cables, motors, and electrical equipment.

Industrial Controls

Heavy-duty control systems for manufacturing and industrial facilities.

Motor Controls

Starters, drives, and control circuits for all motor types and sizes.

Relay Logic

Traditional and modern relay-based control system design and troubleshooting.

Lighting Controls

Smart lighting systems, dimmers, and automated control solutions.

Automation Components

Sensors, actuators, and smart devices for automated building systems.

Regulation Systems

Systems that monitor and regulate voltage, current, temperature, and flow.

Commercial electrical expertise with the capability to handle high-value residential projects requiring advanced control systems and automation.

40+ Years of Industry Experience

Where Trust and Dependability meet

Licensed, insured, and experienced electrical services focused on safety, clear communication, and results that last. Serving Denver & Colorado Springs greater area.
